name: X_secondary_paralog_architecture
description: Architectural record for secondary paralog clusters on the C. elegans X chromosome. The X arms (gene-rich euchromatic ends) are enriched for tandem-duplicated chemoreceptor (sr*) and male-fertility (mss, ssp) gene families. The X centre is gene-poor and recombination-suppressed, similar to autosome centres. Paralog families on X show stronger male-biased expression and faster sequence evolution than autosomal paralogs.

architecture.internal_structure: X arms (0-3 Mb and 14-17.7 Mb) carry dense srh/srw/srz/sra blocks; X centre is sparse; male-bias clusters (mss) are interspersed
